sentences.text_en: A beautiful one.
sentences.text_lu: E schéinen.

sentences.text_en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely beautiful.
sentences.text_lu: D'Vue vum Spëtz vum Bierg war absolut schéin.

sentences.text_en: I bought a beautiful dress for the upcoming formal party.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e schéint Kleed fir déi kommend formell Party kaaft.

sentences.text_en: A small one.
sentences.text_lu: E klengen.

sentences.text_en: A small child was crying for its mother in the street.
sentences.text_lu: E klengt Kand huet an der Strooss fir seng Mamm geplackt.

sentences.text_en: Our apartment is quite small, but it is located in the city center.
sentences.text_lu: Eis Appartement ass éischter kleng, mee et ass am Zentrum vun der Stad.

sentences.text_en: Far away.
sentences.text_lu: Wäit ewech.

sentences.text_en: The station is not far from here, only a five minute walk.
sentences.text_lu: D'Statioun ass net wäit vun hei, just e fënnef-Minutten-Spazéiergang.

sentences.text_en: How far is the city of Luxembourg from the German border?
sentences.text_lu: Wéi wäit ass d'Stad Lëtzebuerg vun der däitscher Grenz ewech?

sentences.text_en: Turn left.
sentences.text_lu: Gitt lénks.

sentences.text_en: Please turn left at the next intersection to reach the museum.
sentences.text_lu: Géi bei der nächster Kräizung lénks, fir de Musée ze erreechen.

sentences.text_en: The library is on the left side of the main office building.
sentences.text_lu: D'Bibliothéik ass op der lénker Säit vum Haaptgebai.

sentences.text_en: Turn right.
sentences.text_lu: Dréit riets.

sentences.text_en: The hotel is located on the right side of the main street.
sentences.text_lu: Den Hotel ass op der rietser Säit vun der Haaptstrooss.

sentences.text_en: Please keep to the right when you are walking in the hallway.
sentences.text_lu: Bleift wéi weg op der rietser Säit, wann Dir am Gang laaft.

sentences.text_en: Up there.
sentences.text_lu: Do uewen.

sentences.text_en: The apartment is on the top floor and has a beautiful view.
sentences.text_lu: L'appartement ass am Top-Etage an huet e schéonen Ausbléck.

sentences.text_en: The book is up there on the top shelf of the large library.
sentences.text_lu: De Buch steet do uewen op der oberster Etage vun der grousser Bibliothéik.

sentences.text_en: Down there.
sentences.text_lu: Downten.

sentences.text_en: The kitchen is on the ground floor, right down the hallway.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kichen ass am Parterre, direkt am Gang.

sentences.text_en: I left my keys down there on the kitchen table this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Schlësselscheelee bei mir op der Kichen-Tësch gelooss, e Mueren.

sentences.text_en: Inside here.
sentences.text_lu: Bannen do.

sentences.text_en: It is much warmer inside the house than it is outside today.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass vill waarmmer an der Haus wéi et haut dobaussen ass.

sentences.text_en: Everything is ready inside the meeting room for the project.
sentences.text_lu: Alles ass am Meetingraum fir de Projet prett.

sentences.text_en: Outside now.
sentences.text_lu: Elo baussen.

sentences.text_en: I like to spend time outside in nature when the sun is out.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gär Zäit dobaussen an der Natur verbringen wann d'Sonn eraus ass.

sentences.text_en: There were many birds singing outside my window this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Et waren vill Vëlleken, déi ech haut Moien bei mengem Fënster gesinn hunn.

sentences.text_en: In front.
sentences.text_lu: Virun.

sentences.text_en: I am standing right in front of the main entrance to the city hall.
sentences.text_lu: Ech steet direkt virun dem Haaptentrée vum Stiedhaus.

sentences.text_en: Please finish your dinner before you start doing your homework.
sentences.text_lu: Eisst Ären Iessen op, ier Dir mat Är Heemwäerk ufänkt.

sentences.text_en: In the back.
sentences.text_lu: Am Fong.

sentences.text_en: The bathroom is located at the back of the long hallway.
sentences.text_lu: D'Bad ass am Enn vum laange Gang.

sentences.text_en: There is a large garden situated at the back of our house.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt e groussen Jardin, deen am Réckhaus steet.

sentences.text_en: In middle.
sentences.text_lu: Am Mëttelen.

sentences.text_en: The old church is located right in the middle of the city.
sentences.text_lu: D'al Kierch ass riets an der Mëtt vun der Stad.

sentences.text_en: We are currently in the middle of a very long and difficult task.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sinn derzeit an der Mëtt vun enger ganz laanger a schwéierer Aarbecht.

sentences.text_en: Hardly.
sentences.text_lu: Kaum.

sentences.text_en: I can hardly understand what he says, he speaks fast.
sentences.text_lu: Ech kann kaum verstinn wat hien seet, hien schwätzt séier.

sentences.text_en: There was hardly anyone else in the park so early.
sentences.text_lu: Et war kaum iergendeen aneren am Park zu där Zäit.

sentences.text_en: Quite a bit.
sentences.text_lu: E ganz Stéck.

sentences.text_en: The exam was quite difficult, but I think I passed.
sentences.text_lu: Den Examen war zimmlech schwéier, mee ech mengen ech hunn bestanden.

sentences.text_en: It is quite a long walk to the city center from here.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass e ganz laange Spazéiergang bis an d'Stad vu bei.

sentences.text_en: Only one.
sentences.text_lu: Eng eenzeg.

sentences.text_en: Only three students arrived on time for the meeting today.
sentences.text_lu: Nëmmen dräi Studenten sinn am Zäit fir d'Reunioun haut ukomm.

sentences.text_en: I have only one sister, who is much older than I am.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn just eng Schwëster, déi vill méi al wéi ech ass.

sentences.text_en: Rarely seen.
sentences.text_lu: Selten ze gesinn.

sentences.text_en: It is rare to see such a dedicated and talented student.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass rar, esou e engagéierten a talentéierten Student ze gesinn.

sentences.text_en: This type of flower blooms very rarely in this region.
sentences.text_lu: Dës Aart Blumm bléit ganz selten an dëser Regioun.

sentences.text_en: At the moment.
sentences.text_lu: Am Moment.

sentences.text_en: I am currently out of office, please leave a message.
sentences.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan net am Büro, léisst wgl. eng Message.

sentences.text_en: At this moment, everything seems to be going quite well.
sentences.text_lu: Am Moment schéngt alles ganz gutt ze lafen.

sentences.text_en: Currently.
sentences.text_lu: Aktuell.

sentences.text_en: We are currently experiencing some technical difficulties.
sentences.text_lu: Mir hunn momentan e puer technesch Problemer.

sentences.text_en: Momentary success is not enough, we need long-term growth.
sentences.text_lu: Momentanen Erfolleg ass net genuch, mir brauchen langfristeg Wuesstum.

sentences.text_en: In meantime.
sentences.text_lu: An der Tëschenzäit.

sentences.text_en: I will wait here; in the meantime, you can go and look.
sentences.text_lu: Ech wäert hei waarden; an der Tëschenzäit kënnt Dir kucken.

sentences.text_en: In the interim between meetings, I checked my emails.
sentences.text_lu: Tëscht den Reuniounen hunn ech meng E-Mailen iwwerpréift.

sentences.text_en: Either this.
sentences.text_lu: Entweder dëst.

sentences.text_en: You can either stay here or come with us to the park.
sentences.text_lu: Dir kënnt entweder hei bleiwen oder mat eis an de Park kommen.

sentences.text_en: Either way, we must arrive at the station by five.
sentences.text_lu: Egal wéi, mir mussen bis fënnef am Gare sinn.

sentences.text_en: Neither that.
sentences.text_lu: Dat och net.

sentences.text_en: Neither the teacher nor the students were in the room.
sentences.text_lu: Weder de Professeur nach d'Schüler waren an der Sall.

sentences.text_en: I have neither the time nor the money for a holiday.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn wéinst dem Geld- a Zäitmangel keng Méiglechkeet fir e Vakanz.

sentences.text_en: You are here.
sentences.text_lu: Dir sidd hei.

sentences.text_en: You should focus on your studies to get a good job.
sentences.text_lu: Dir sollt Iech op Äre Studium konzentréieren, fir eng gutt Aarbecht ze kréien.

sentences.text_en: Are you coming with us to the cinema tonight?
sentences.text_lu: Komms du mat eis an d'Kino haut an der Nuecht?

sentences.text_en: See me now.
sentences.text_lu: Komm elo bei mir.

sentences.text_en: He invited me to the party but I couldn't go then.
sentences.text_lu: Hie huet mech op d'Party invitéiert, awer ech konnt net dohinn goen.

sentences.text_en: Please tell me the truth about what happened back then.
sentences.text_lu: Soe mir w.e.g. d'Wahrheet iwwer wat dofirhier geschitt ass.

sentences.text_en: I see you.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gesinn dech.

sentences.text_en: I will support you in whatever decision you make now.
sentences.text_lu: Ech wäert Iech bei all Entscheedung, déi Dir elo trëfft, ënnerstëtzen.

sentences.text_en: Can I see you at the station at five o'clock today?
sentences.text_lu: Kann ech dich haut um fënnef Auer am Bahnhof treffen?

sentences.text_en: Give to him.
sentences.text_lu: Ginn et him.

sentences.text_en: I gave him the keys to the house early this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn him de Schlässel vum Haus fréi moies ginn.

sentences.text_en: She told him a secret that he promised to keep well.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet him e Geheimnis erzielt, dat hien versprach huet, gutt ze bewahren.

sentences.text_en: Give to us.
sentences.text_lu: Ginn et eis.

sentences.text_en: The teacher gave us a lot of homework for the weekend.
sentences.text_lu: De Professeur huet eis fir de Weekend vill Hausaufgaben opginn.

sentences.text_en: He joined us for dinner at the new Italian restaurant.
sentences.text_lu: Hie gouf bei eis fir Iessen am neien italieeneschen Restaurant.

sentences.text_en: Give to you.
sentences.text_lu: Ginn et dir.

sentences.text_en: I brought this for you all to enjoy at the party.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn dëst matbruecht, fir datt dir et all op der Party genéisst.

sentences.text_en: I will meet you all at the main entrance of the park.
sentences.text_lu: Ech begéinen Iech all beim Haaptentree vum Park.

sentences.text_en: It is mine.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass mäin.

sentences.text_en: This is my house and that one over there is yours.
sentences.text_lu: Dëst ass mäi Haus a dat do dräi ass däin.

sentences.text_en: My coffee is cold, could you please warm it up again?
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Kaffi ass kal, kéint Dir et wärmen?

sentences.text_en: It is yours.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass dyng.

sentences.text_en: Is this your book or did you borrow it from someone?
sentences.text_lu: Ass dëst Äert Buch oder huet et vun iemanden geléint?

sentences.text_en: Your house is very beautiful and has a large garden.
sentences.text_lu: Är Haus ass ganz schéin a gëtt et e groussen Jardin.

sentences.text_en: It is ours.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass eis.

sentences.text_en: This is our house where we have lived for five years.
sentences.text_lu: Dëst ass eise Haus wou mir fir fënnef Joer gelieft hunn.

sentences.text_en: Our daughter is studying medicine at the university.
sentences.text_lu: Eis Duechter studéiert Medizin op der Uni.

sentences.text_en: It is yours.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass dat Däin.

sentences.text_en: Is this your project or did you work on it together?
sentences.text_lu: Ass dëst Äre Projet oder huet Dir doran zesummen geschafft?

sentences.text_en: Your garden is full of beautiful and colorful flowers.
sentences.text_lu: Äre Gaart ass voll mat schéngen a faarwege Blummen.

sentences.text_en: This one here.
sentences.text_lu: Dësse grad.

sentences.text_en: I like this book more than the one I read last week.
sentences.text_lu: Ech moossen dëst Buch méi wéi dat, dat ech lescht Woch gelies hunn.

sentences.text_en: This is the best coffee that I have ever tasted here.
sentences.text_lu: Dëst ass de beschte Kaffi, deen ech bis elo geschmaacht hunn.

sentences.text_en: I know that.
sentences.text_lu: Ech weess dat.

sentences.text_en: I believe that he will arrive on time for the meeting.
sentences.text_lu: Ech mengen, hie wäert am Zäit fir d'Reunioun ukommen.

sentences.text_en: It is true that he moved away to another country now.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass wouer datt hien elo an e anert Land geplënnert ass.

sentences.text_en: Where is it?
sentences.text_lu: Wou ass et?

sentences.text_en: Where are you going for your summer holiday this year?
sentences.text_lu: Wou geet et fir Ären Summerurlaub dëst Joer?

sentences.text_en: I know where he lives, it is just around the corner.
sentences.text_lu: Ech weess wou hien wunnt, et ass just ëm d'Eck.

sentences.text_en: Why is it?
sentences.text_lu: Firwat ass dat esou?

sentences.text_en: Why are you late for the meeting today? What happened?
sentences.text_lu: Firwat sidd Dir haut verspéit zum Meeting? Wat ass passéiert?

sentences.text_en: I want to know why he decided to leave the company now.
sentences.text_lu: Ech wëll wëssen, firwat hie decidéiert huet, d'Firma elo ze verloossen.

sentences.text_en: Who is it?
sentences.text_lu: Wien ass et?

sentences.text_en: Who is the man standing over there by the main gate?
sentences.text_lu: Wien ass de Mann, deen do bei der Haaptport steet?

sentences.text_en: I don't know who called me while I was in the meeting.
sentences.text_lu: Ech weess net wien mech geruff huet wéi ech am Meeting war.
